text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During the press conference before the autumn
Tenno Sho, Fuji Kiseki wows the crowd with her
sleight of hand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her smile is bright and bold now that she's no
longer held back by anxiety. She promises to give
them the most wondrous, heart-stopping
entertainment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes are fixed resolutely on what she must
do, and she strides into the race with her head
held high.
